docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AWAD MOHAMED IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICKY WEISBROTH IS PRESENT. SERVICE IS UNTIMELY BY 4 DAYS. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHAMED, AWAD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEISBROTH, RICKY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MOHAMED, AWAD AS TO DEFENDANT WEISBROTH, RICKY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE:$0.00 SERVED MAY-14-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WEISBROTH, RICKY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2021 - JUDGMENT.
